name: yaw_spool_up
description: Short full-yaw spin-up from a dead stop (0.6s, then neutral) -- sized to stay in frame for continuous single-landmark pixel tracking, unlike standing_start_yaw.json's long multi-second hold (meant for the old full-360-rotation stopwatch method instead). Gives a full omega(t) spin-up curve to cross-check against the existing tau_yaw derivation (a single 360-rotation timing number), and serves as the baseline transient to compare yaw_reversal.json's post-flip transient against.
